sections.paragraph:
Original: אחזיהוּ אחזיה

Transliteration: 'ăchazyâh 'ăchazyâhû

Phonetic: akh-az-yaw'

BDB Definition:

Ahaziah = "Jehovah (Yahu) holds (possesses)"
  1. ruler of Israel, son of Ahab
  2. ruler of Judah, son of Jehoram (Joram)

Origin: from H270 and H3050

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
